en.name: Muni Besen Ferreira
en.title: Senior software developer
en.profile: I am a highly skilled software developer with over 8 years of experience in Python, C++, C#, JavaScript, and Rust. I have a proven track record in developing robust web applications using Django, Flask, React, and Vue.js, with expertise in PostgreSQL, SQLite, and SQL. My experience includes web scraping, ChatGPT and LLM integrations, cybersecurity, DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Playwright, FastAPI, Node.js, shell scripting, and more. I am passionate about leveraging my extensive experience and skills in software development, automation, and cybersecurity to deliver impactful solutions.

pt.name: Muni Besen Ferreira
pt.title: Desenvolvedor de Software Senior
pt.profile: Sou um desenvolvedor de software altamente qualificado com mais de 8 anos de experiência em Python, C++, C#, JavaScript e Rust. Tenho um histórico comprovado no desenvolvimento de aplicações web robustas usando Django, Flask, React e Vue.js, com expertise em PostgreSQL, SQLite e SQL. Minha experiência inclui web scraping, integrações com ChatGPT e LLMs, cibersegurança, DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Playwright, FastAPI, Node.js, shell scripting e muito mais. Sou apaixonado por aproveitar minha ampla experiência e habilidades em desenvolvimento de software, automação e cibersegurança para entregar soluções de impacto.

en.description: As Co-Founder, I lead the company's technology strategy and oversee the delivery of innovative software solutions for clients across a wide range of industries. My work spans technology consulting, custom software development, cybersecurity, process automation, cloud solutions, and digital transformation — from solution design and architecture through to implementation and deployment.
responsibilities: Designing system architectures and leading technical projects end-to-end
Developing web applications, platforms, APIs, internal tools, and automation solutions
Promoting software engineering best practices, DevSecOps, and modern cloud infrastructure
Translating business challenges into effective technology solutions for clients
Managing multiple projects simultaneously across diverse industries
Driving continuous innovation through adoption of modern technologies and methodologies
en.tech_stack: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Cloud Infrastructure (GCP/AWS), DevSecOps, CI/CD

en.description: Full-stack development on an AI-powered web platform built with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Shipped API security improvements, automated government form workflows, and built a lightweight HTTP automation client to replace browser-based tooling — reducing infrastructure overhead significantly. Conducted a comprehensive security audit covering authentication, authorization, PII handling, and API surface. Contributed to cloud hosting architecture and infrastructure planning.
responsibilities: Shipping API security improvements and hardening authentication flows
Automating government form workflows end-to-end
Building a lightweight HTTP automation client to replace browser-based tooling
Conducting comprehensive security audits (auth, authorization, PII, API surface)
Contributing to cloud hosting architecture and infrastructure planning

Deployed cloud infrastructure on GCP using Pulumi (Infrastructure as Code). Led technical decisions from early prototype to production launch with live customers.
responsibilities: Building inspection management workflows and core SaaS product modules

Deploying and managing cloud infrastructure on GCP using Pulumi (IaC)

en.description: Completed an intensive 124-hour specialized program in data analytics, data governance frameworks, and statistical computing using the R programming language. The curriculum encompassed advanced data manipulation techniques, exploratory data analysis (EDA), statistical modeling, data visualization methodologies, and best practices in data governance and quality assurance. Gained proficiency in R's ecosystem including tidyverse, data.table, and Shiny for interactive dashboards, enabling the transformation of raw datasets into actionable business intelligence insights.

Completed a comprehensive 88-hour professional certification program focused on advanced software engineering principles and enterprise-level development practices. The curriculum covered algorithmic thinking, computational logic, object-oriented programming paradigms, relational database design and optimization using SQL, and advanced C# development including LINQ, async/await patterns, dependency injection, and modern .NET framework features. The program emphasized industry best practices, code quality standards, and scalable software architecture design patterns.

en.institution: Escola Secundária Luís de Freitas Branco - Portugal
en.description: Completed secondary education curriculum covering core academic disciplines including mathematics, sciences, and humanities. The program provided a solid foundation in analytical thinking, problem-solving methodologies, and academic rigor that complemented my self-directed learning in software development and technology.

en.institution: ECG - School of Business and Management - Luxembourg
en.description: Completed a comprehensive business and management program focusing on organizational dynamics, strategic planning, financial analysis, project management methodologies, and entrepreneurial frameworks. The curriculum integrated theoretical business concepts with practical case studies, enhancing my ability to understand business requirements, communicate effectively with stakeholders, and align technical solutions with organizational objectives. This business acumen has proven invaluable in translating complex technical capabilities into strategic business value.

pt.institution: Enap - Análise de Dados e Programação
pt.description: Concluí um programa intensivo de 124 horas especializado em análise de dados, frameworks de governança de dados e computação estatística utilizando a linguagem de programação R. O currículo abrangeu técnicas avançadas de manipulação de dados, análise exploratória de dados (EDA), modelagem estatística, metodologias de visualização de dados e melhores práticas em governança e garantia de qualidade de dados. Adquiri proficiência no ecossistema R incluindo tidyverse, data.table e Shiny para dashboards interativos, permitindo a transformação de conjuntos de dados brutos em insights acionáveis de business intelligence.

Concluí um programa abrangente de certificação profissional de 88 horas focado em princípios avançados de engenharia de software e práticas de desenvolvimento em nível empresarial. O currículo cobriu pensamento algorítmico, lógica computacional, paradigmas de programação orientada a objetos, design e otimização de bancos de dados relacionais usando SQL, e desenvolvimento avançado em C# incluindo LINQ, padrões async/await, injeção de dependência e recursos modernos do framework .NET. O programa enfatizou as melhores práticas da indústria, padrões de qualidade de código e padrões de design de arquitetura de software escalável.

pt.institution: Escola Secundária Luís de Freitas Branco - Portugal
pt.description: Concluí o currículo do ensino secundário abrangendo disciplinas acadêmicas fundamentais incluindo matemática, ciências e humanidades. O programa forneceu uma base sólida em pensamento analítico, metodologias de resolução de problemas e rigor acadêmico que complementou meu aprendizado autodirigido em desenvolvimento de software e tecnologia.

pt.institution: ECG - Escola de Negócios e Gestão - Luxemburgo
pt.description: Concluí um programa abrangente de negócios e gestão focado em dinâmicas organizacionais, planejamento estratégico, análise financeira, metodologias de gestão de projetos e frameworks empreendedores. O currículo integrou conceitos teóricos de negócios com estudos de caso práticos, aprimorando minha capacidade de compreender requisitos de negócios, comunicar efetivamente com stakeholders e alinhar soluções técnicas com objetivos organizacionais. Esta compreensão de negócios tem se mostrado inestimável na tradução de capacidades técnicas complexas em valor estratégico para o negócio.
